quote: One of the most versatile young physiotherapists I have worked with — equally strong with orthopaedic caseloads and complex amputee rehabilitation.
longQuote: She is one of the most versatile physiotherapists I have worked alongside — equally strong with orthopaedic and post-operative caseloads. Clear communicator, generous with colleagues, and she fits into a team from day one.
